Records.description: Non-planar topology C for three-particle cut of two-loop forward $bW^* \to bW^*$ box. 1 additional master integral ($I_{12}$) with all 7 propagators, computed in GPLs up to weight 4.
Records.familyName: 1-mass 2-loop 2-point non-planar cut forward box for b->uW* double real emission (topology C)

Results.resultTeX: \frac{1}{\varepsilon^2}+\frac{\log \left(\frac{m^2}{m^2-M^2}\right)-\log \left(m^2-M^2\right)-m^2 M^{-2} \log \left(\frac{m^2}{m^2-M^2}\right)+m^2 M^{-2} \log \left(1-\frac{M^2}{m^2}\right)-\log (m^2)+4}{\varepsilon}+\left(-2 H\left(0,m^2 M^{-2}\,;1\right)+m^2 M^{-2} H\left(0,m^2 M^{-2}\,;1\right)-m^2 M^{-2} H\left(0,1-m^2 M^{-2}\,;1\right)+4 H(-1,-1\,;1)+m^2^2 M^{-4} \log ^2\left(\frac{m^2}{m^2-M^2}\right)-2 m^2 \zeta(2) M^{-2}-\frac{1}{6} \pi ^2 m^2 M^{-2}+\log ^2\left(\frac{m^2}{m^2-M^2}\right)+\log ^2\left(m^2-M^2\right)+\log ^2\left(1-\frac{M^2}{m^2}\right)-2 m^2 M^{-2} \log ^2\left(\frac{m^2}{m^2-M^2}\right)-\frac{1}{2} m^2 M^{-2} \log ^2\left(\frac{M^2}{m^2}-1\right)-2 \log (m^2) \log \left(\frac{m^2}{m^2-M^2}\right)+2 m^2 M^{-2} \log (m^2) \log \left(\frac{m^2}{m^2-M^2}\right)+4 \log \left(\frac{m^2}{m^2-M^2}\right)-4 \log \left(m^2-M^2\right)-4 m^2 M^{-2} \log \left(\frac{m^2}{m^2-M^2}\right)+4 m^2 M^{-2} \log \left(1-\frac{M^2}{m^2}\right)-2 m^2 M^{-2} \log \left(m^2-M^2\right) \log \left(1-\frac{M^2}{m^2}\right)-m^2 M^{-2} \log \left(\frac{m^2}{m^2-M^2}\right) \log \left(\frac{M^2}{m^2}-1\right)+\log ^2(m^2)-4 \log (m^2)+\zeta(2)+12-2 \log ^2(2)\right)+O\left(\varepsilon^1\right)

CutDiagramNote: Three-particle cut (R_5,R_6,R_7) of the 2-loop forward b W* -> b W* box from arXiv:1807.01681 (topology C, I_12). The uncut propagator subgraph reduces to a 2-loop dumbbell with one on-shell bottom leg (p_1^2 = m_b^2, identified with internal mass m) and one massless leg (p_2^2 = 0); the integral variable q = p_1 - p_2 carries momentum through the dumbbell (q^2 = M^2). External virtualities are therefore asymmetric; the standard 2-point equal-externals check should be relaxed whenever CutDiagram is true.
